headline: AJG Grows Canada Commercial Insurance Business With WMB Acquisition
summary: Arthur J. Gallagher expands its specialty insurance platform with the WMB acquisition, strengthening its commercial insurance presence in Western Canada.

headline: WTW Lags Industry, Trades at a Discount: What Investors Should Do Now?
summary: Willis Towers Watson's speciality pipeline, AI-driven margin expansion and the Newfront acquisition support long-term growth, though slower organic growth and macro risks remain.

headline: Arthur J. Gallagher Earnings Preview: What to Expect

headline: Keefe, Bruyette & Woods Maintains Market Perform on Arthur J. Gallagher, Raises Price Target to $261
summary: Keefe, Bruyette & Woods  analyst Meyer Shields   maintains Arthur J. Gallagher (NYSE:AJG) with a Market Perform and raises the price target from $242 to $261.
